case_title: JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. MICHELLE EPSTEIN et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1630 PORTOLA DRIVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94127, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, MICHELLE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, MICHELLE DOES 1 TO 10,, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-01-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MICHELLE EPSTEIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, MICHELLE

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, MICHELLE
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: FIRST APPEARANCE FEES WERE PAID BY DEFT, MICHELLE EPSTEIN.
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT; DECLARATION OF JOHN FARRELL IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
